response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise, leadership in open-source projects, and diverse experience in software development and architecture. However, his background leans more toward hands-on development than explicit tech leadership or IT consulting, and his German proficiency is only at a basic level, which may limit client-facing roles.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development, architecture, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective platform).
Proven track record at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) with exposure to scalable systems and AI infrastructure.
Strong technical breadth across languages (TypeScript, Python, DLang) and domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS).
concerns: Limited explicit experience in IT consulting or advising clients on architecture/security (core job responsibility).
German proficiency is basic (C1 required), which may hinder client interactions in a German-speaking context.
Career focus appears more on individual contribution than team leadership or strategic project oversight.
